151.summary: 151 is a PackDex-supported Scarlet & Violet expansion released on September 22, 2023. The local catalog currently tracks 208 supported cards.
funFacts: The main set follows National Pokédex order across the original 151 Pokémon.

30th-anniversary.summary: A PackDex-created preview containing 15 currently supported cards selected from announced 30th-anniversary material. It is not labeled as an official standalone expansion.
funFacts: PackDex labels this as a preview compilation, not an official standalone expansion.
